texts.full_text: h quality chess set that is different from the usual classic Staunton design then this set is perfect! The chessmen are very faithful reproductions of the original Isle of Lewis artefacts. They have been created from moulds that are precisely laser scanned from the originals, owned and brought to you by the National Museums of Scotland. Given the majestic size of the pieces, they require a suitably grand chess board. This 24 inch (60cm) board is Spanish-made with beautiful deep blacks of anegre wood and a high gloss lacquer. It reflects the chessmen delightfully, making them seem almost weightless. A stunning chess

texts.preview_head: ach as well: Through Habitat’s system of tithing, we have sponsored four addditional homes in other parts of the world where there is also great need for decent living conditions. These global partner
texts.preview_tail: families worldwide achieve homeownership dreams that can transform their lives just as they do in Hudson River Presbyterian circles here at home. Our approach emphasizes sustainable building practices
texts.full_text: ach as well: Through Habitat’s system of tithing, we have sponsored four addditional homes in other parts of the world where there is also great need for decent living conditions. These global partnerships allow us to extend our mission and impact beyond local communities. By supporting home construction projects abroad through Newburgh Habitat's international initiatives, PresbyBuild helps families worldwide achieve homeownership dreams that can transform their lives just as they do in Hudson River Presbyterian circles here at home. Our approach emphasizes sustainable building practices

texts.full_text: a symphony, guiding through shadows deep. Amidst verdant splendor lies clarity." 5. Completing Structures like Dialogues or Narrative Descriptions: Another way is creating dialogic narratives which could be found in novels and storybooks. Input: As the hero stood at dawn's brink on his final quest, he looked over what had become of him since starting it all... Output: "...his once vibrant armor now mottled by trials. The air was thick with a sense that this day may just mark not an ending but perhaps only another beginning..." So from the above few examples we see text completion ranges vastly across several themes and structures each following its nuanced context. texts.full_text: time, the total number of animals used for this time point was 72. The number of mice used for statistical analysis for the 84-day time point was as follows. For the mild cerebral ischemia paradigm, 15 sham animals (survival rate 100%), 14 NPC-treated mice (survival rate 93.3%) and 16 controls (survival rate 88.8%) were used for statistical analysis. For the severe cerebral ischemia paradigm, 15 sham animals (survival rate 100%), 16 NPC-treated mice (survival rate 84.2%), and 17 controls (survival rate 80.9%) were used. Noteworthy, some mice suffering from severe cerebral ischemia could not perform all behavioral tests due to the severity of the disease. When applicable, this is explicitly mentioned in the results part and the corresponding figure legend as well. All mice that were allowed to survive for 84 days post-stroke were used for immunohistochemistry (neuronal density) and behavioral analysis. For the latter purpose, mice were trained for each behavioral test on days 3--1 before induction of cerebral ischemia. An overview of the experimental paradigm is given in Figure [1](#F1){ref-type="fig"}. ![**Experimental paradigm**. Male C57BL6 mice were exposed to either 45 min or 90 min of cerebral ischemia followed by survival periods of either 2 days or 84 days. Sham animals underwent the same operational technique, but without actually inserting a filament for occlusion of the left middle cerebral artery. All mice received an intravenous injection of PBS or (NPCs; 1
